1→// ============================================================================
     2→// OpCode: 가상 머신의 모든 연산 명령어
     3→// ============================================================================
     4→
     5→/// 바이트코드 명령어
     6→#[repr(u8)]
     7→#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
     8→pub enum OpCode {
     9→    /// 상수 푸시: 상수 풀의 인덱스를 스택에 로드
    10→    OpConstant = 0,
    11→
    12→    /// 덧셈: 스택 상단 두 값을 더함
    13→    OpAdd = 1,
    14→
    15→    /// 뺄셈: 스택 상단 두 값을 뺌
    16→    OpSub = 2,
    17→
    18→    /// 곱셈: 스택 상단 두 값을 곱함
    19→    OpMul = 3,
    20→
    21→    /// 나눗셈: 스택 상단 두 값을 나눔
    22→    OpDiv = 4,
    23→
    24→    /// 불리언 참: true를 스택에 푸시
    25→    OpTrue = 5,
    26→
    27→    /// 불리언 거짓: false를 스택에 푸시
    28→    OpFalse = 6,
    29→
    30→    /// 비교 같음: ==
    31→    OpEqual = 7,
    32→
    33→    /// 비교 같지 않음: !=
    34→    OpNotEqual = 8,
    35→
    36→    /// 비교 미만: <
    37→    OpLessThan = 9,
    38→
    39→    /// 비교 이상: >=
    40→    OpGreaterThanOrEqual = 10,
    41→
    42→    /// 부정: ! (스택 상단값)
    43→    OpBang = 11,
    44→
    45→    /// 음수: - (스택 상단값)
    46→    OpMinus = 12,
    47→
    48→    /// 점프: 조건 없이 지정된 위치로 이동
    49→    OpJump = 13,
    50→
    51→    /// 조건부 점프: 스택 상단이 거짓이면 점프
    52→    OpJumpNotTruthy = 14,
    53→
    54→    /// Null: null 값을 스택에 푸시
    55→    OpNull = 15,
    56→
    57→    /// 팝: 스택 상단값 제거
    58→    OpPop = 16,
    59→
    60→    /// 반환: 함수에서 반환 (값 있음)
    61→    OpReturnValue = 17,
    62→
    63→    /// 반환: 함수에서 반환 (값 없음)
    64→    OpReturn = 18,
    65→
    66→    /// 변수 로드: 로컬 저장소에서 변수 로드
    67→    OpGetLocal = 19,
    68→
    69→    /// 변수 저장: 로컬 저장소에 변수 저장
    70→    OpSetLocal = 20,
    71→
    72→    /// 배열 구성: N개의 요소로 배열 생성
    73→    OpArray = 21,
    74→
    75→    /// 해시맵 구성: K,V 쌍으로 해시맵 생성
    76→    OpHash = 22,
    77→
    78→    /// 인덱싱: 배열/해시맵에서 인덱싱
    79→    OpIndex = 23,
    80→
    81→    /// 함수 호출: N개 인자로 함수 호출
    82→    OpCall = 24,
    83→
    84→    /// 프로그램 종료
    85→    OpEnd = 255,
    86→}
    87→
    88→impl OpCode {
    89→    /// OpCode를 바이트로 변환
    90→    pub fn as_byte(self) -> u8 {
    91→        self as u8
    92→    }
    93→
    94→    /// 바이트를 OpCode로 변환
    95→    pub fn from_byte(byte: u8) -> Option<Self> {
    96→        match byte {
    97→            0 => Some(OpCode::OpConstant),
    98→            1 => Some(OpCode::OpAdd),
    99→            2 => Some(OpCode::OpSub),
   100→            3 => Some(OpCode::OpMul),
   101→            4 => Some(OpCode::OpDiv),
   102→            5 => Some(OpCode::OpTrue),
   103→            6 => Some(OpCode::OpFalse),
   104→            7 => Some(OpCode::OpEqual),
   105→            8 => Some(OpCode::OpNotEqual),
   106→            9 => Some(OpCode::OpLessThan),
   107→            10 => Some(OpCode::OpGreaterThanOrEqual),
   108→            11 => Some(OpCode::OpBang),
   109→            12 => Some(OpCode::OpMinus),
   110→            13 => Some(OpCode::OpJump),
   111→            14 => Some(OpCode::OpJumpNotTruthy),
   112→            15 => Some(OpCode::OpNull),
   113→            16 => Some(OpCode::OpPop),
   114→            17 => Some(OpCode::OpReturnValue),
   115→            18 => Some(OpCode::OpReturn),
   116→            19 => Some(OpCode::OpGetLocal),
   117→            20 => Some(OpCode::OpSetLocal),
   118→            21 => Some(OpCode::OpArray),
   119→            22 => Some(OpCode::OpHash),
   120→            23 => Some(OpCode::OpIndex),
   121→            24 => Some(OpCode::OpCall),
   122→            255 => Some(OpCode::OpEnd),
   123→            _ => None,
   124→        }
   125→    }
   126→
   127→    /// OpCode 이름
   128→    pub fn name(&self) -> &'static str {
   129→        match self {
   130→            OpCode::OpConstant => "CONSTANT",
   131→            OpCode::OpAdd => "ADD",
   132→            OpCode::OpSub => "SUB",
   133→            OpCode::OpMul => "MUL",
   134→            OpCode::OpDiv => "DIV",
   135→            OpCode::OpTrue => "TRUE",
   136→            OpCode::OpFalse => "FALSE",
   137→            OpCode::OpEqual => "EQUAL",
   138→            OpCode::OpNotEqual => "NOT_EQUAL",
   139→            OpCode::OpLessThan => "LESS_THAN",
   140→            OpCode::OpGreaterThanOrEqual => "GREATER_EQUAL",
   141→            OpCode::OpBang => "BANG",
   142→            OpCode::OpMinus => "MINUS",
   143→            OpCode::OpJump => "JUMP",
   144→            OpCode::OpJumpNotTruthy => "JUMP_NOT_TRUTHY",
   145→            OpCode::OpNull => "NULL",
   146→            OpCode::OpPop => "POP",
   147→            OpCode::OpReturnValue => "RETURN_VALUE",
   148→            OpCode::OpReturn => "RETURN",
   149→            OpCode::OpGetLocal => "GET_LOCAL",
   150→            OpCode::OpSetLocal => "SET_LOCAL",
   151→            OpCode::OpArray => "ARRAY",
   152→            OpCode::OpHash => "HASH",
   153→            OpCode::OpIndex => "INDEX",
   154→            OpCode::OpCall => "CALL",
   155→            OpCode::OpEnd => "END",
   156→        }
   157→    }
   158→
   159→    /// 피연산자 수 반환
   160→    pub fn operand_width(&self) -> usize {
   161→        match self {
   162→            // 인덱스(2바이트): u16
   163→            OpCode::OpConstant => 2,
   164→            OpCode::OpJump => 2,
   165→            OpCode::OpJumpNotTruthy => 2,
   166→            OpCode::OpGetLocal => 1,
   167→            OpCode::OpSetLocal => 1,
   168→            OpCode::OpArray => 2,
   169→            OpCode::OpHash => 2,
   170→            OpCode::OpCall => 1,
   171→            // 피연산자 없음
   172→            _ => 0,
   173→        }
   174→    }
   175→}
   176→
   177→#[cfg(test)]
   178→mod tests {
   179→    use super::*;
   180→
   181→    #[test]
   182→    fn test_opcode_round_trip() {
   183→        let opcodes = vec![
   184→            OpCode::OpConstant,
   185→            OpCode::OpAdd,
   186→            OpCode::OpTrue,
   187→            OpCode::OpFalse,
   188→        ];
   189→
   190→        for op in opcodes {
   191→            let byte = op.as_byte();
   192→            let recovered = OpCode::from_byte(byte).unwrap();
   193→            assert_eq!(op, recovered);
   194→        }
   195→    }
   196→
   197→    #[test]
   198→    fn test_operand_widths() {
   199→        assert_eq!(OpCode::OpConstant.operand_width(), 2);
   200→        assert_eq!(OpCode::OpAdd.operand_width(), 0);
   201→        assert_eq!(OpCode::OpTrue.operand_width(), 0);
   202→        assert_eq!(OpCode::OpJump.operand_width(), 2);
   203→    }
   204→}
   205→

1→// ============================================================================
     2→// AST: Abstract Syntax Tree
     3→// ============================================================================
     4→
     5→/// 표현식
     6→#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
     7→pub enum Expression {
     8→    /// 정수 리터럴
     9→    Integer(i64),
    10→
    11→    /// 불리언 리터럴
    12→    Boolean(bool),
    13→
    14→    /// 식별자
    15→    Identifier(String),
    16→
    17→    /// 전위 연산: !x, -5
    18→    Prefix(String, Box<Expression>),
    19→
    20→    /// 중위 연산: x + y
    21→    Infix(String, Box<Expression>, Box<Expression>),
    22→
    23→    /// if 표현식
    24→    If {
    25→        condition: Box<Expression>,
    26→        consequence: Vec<Statement>,
    27→        alternative: Option<Vec<Statement>>,
    28→    },
    29→
    30→    /// 함수 호출
    31→    Call {
    32→        function: Box<Expression>,
    33→        arguments: Vec<Expression>,
    34→    },
    35→
    36→    /// 배열 리터럴
    37→    Array(Vec<Expression>),
    38→
    39→    /// 인덱싱
    40→    Index(Box<Expression>, Box<Expression>),
    41→
    42→    /// null
    43→    Null,
    44→}
    45→
    46→/// 문장
    47→#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
    48→pub enum Statement {
    49→    /// 변수 선언: let x = 10;
    50→    Let {
    51→        name: String,
    52→        value: Expression,
    53→    },
    54→
    55→    /// 표현식 문장
    56→    Expression(Expression),
    57→
    58→    /// 반환: return 42;
    59→    Return(Expression),
    60→
    61→    /// 블록
    62→    Block(Vec<Statement>),
    63→}
    64→
    65→/// 프로그램
    66→#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
    67→pub struct Program {
    68→    pub statements: Vec<Statement>,
    69→}
    70→
    71→impl Program {
    72→    pub fn new(statements: Vec<Statement>) -> Self {
    73→        Program { statements }
    74→    }
    75→}
    76→
    77→#[cfg(test)]
    78→mod tests {
    79→    use super::*;
    80→
    81→    #[test]
    82→    fn test_expression_integer() {
    83→        let expr = Expression::Integer(42);
    84→        match expr {
    85→            Expression::Integer(n) => assert_eq!(n, 42),
    86→            _ => panic!("Expected Integer"),
    87→        }
    88→    }
    89→
    90→    #[test]
    91→    fn test_expression_infix() {
    92→        let expr = Expression::Infix(
    93→            "+".to_string(),
    94→            Box::new(Expression::Integer(5)),
    95→            Box::new(Expression::Integer(3)),
    96→        );
    97→
    98→        match expr {
    99→            Expression::Infix(op, _, _) => assert_eq!(op, "+"),
   100→            _ => panic!("Expected Infix"),
   101→        }
   102→    }
   103→}
   104→
